recommended_action: Review top suspected duplicate invoice pairs and place payment hold where payment has not been released.
success_measure: High-risk duplicate candidates reviewed before payment release

recommended_action: Tighten MIRO duplicate invoice checks and define near-match exception logic for same vendor and similar amount.
success_measure: Reduction in repeat duplicate invoice exceptions

recommended_action: Validate duplicate bank account vendors and require documented approval for any legitimate shared bank account.
success_measure: All duplicate bank account exceptions dispositioned

recommended_action: Perform enhanced review of new vendors with high cumulative payments during the first 90 days.
success_measure: New-vendor high-payment exceptions reviewed with onboarding evidence

recommended_action: Reconcile approver master data to active employees and remove inactive or missing approver assignments.
success_measure: Zero open missing or inactive approver exceptions

recommended_action: Configure hard workflow stops when purchase order value exceeds approver authorization limit.
success_measure: No PO approvals exceed configured employee authority limits

recommended_action: Monitor same-day same-vendor purchase order clusters that are individually below threshold but cumulatively above threshold.
success_measure: Monthly split-purchase exception report reviewed by Procurement

recommended_action: Review repeat vendors and requestors involved in split-purchase clusters for training or disciplinary follow-up.
success_measure: Repeat split-purchase behavior reduced quarter over quarter

recommended_action: Create a remediation tracker linking each confirmed exception to owner, root cause, recovery status, and closure evidence.
success_measure: All high-priority exceptions assigned and tracked to closure

recommended_action: Schedule recurring dashboard generation and exception exports as a continuous control monitoring process.
success_measure: Dashboard refreshed on agreed cadence with documented review evidence
